prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2004-2008 Toyota 2ZZ-GE (from the Celica SS-II or Corolla T-Sport) with a custom bellhousing adapter plate (MFactory or Fidanza) to mate with the original E154F transaxle, retaining AWD compatibility. Pair with a HKS Super SQV IV blow-off valve and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system (Sparco or Fujitsubo) with a 2.5-inch center section and 4-2-1 header (JUN or Tomei) for optimized scavenging.

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (Journal Bearing, .64 A/R turbine housing) on a custom manifold (Trust/GReddy or custom-fabricated) with a front-mount intercooler (GReddy Type-R or HKS L-Spec) and a custom 3-inch silicone intake piping system (Samco or Mishimoto). Supporting mods include a Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump, 650cc Denso injectors (PN: 23250-74020), and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with a custom AWD-compatible launch control map.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for the E150F chassis) paired with Cusco 22mm front and 20mm rear sway bars. Polyurethane bushings (Whiteline or SuperPro) for the front control arms, rear trailing arms, and subframe mounts. Braking upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with AP Racing CP5550 calipers (front) and CP5200 (rear), using Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge 6AN stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (modified for the Carib’s unique rear quarter panels) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (Seibon or VIS Racing) to clear 245/40R17 front and 265/35R17 rear tires (Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R or Toyo R888R) on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +22 front, 17x10 +12 rear).

Custom front bumper lip (J’s Racing or custom-fabricated) with integrated canards (Aero Catch or custom 3D-printed) and a rear diffuser (Voltex or custom carbon fiber) to match the OEM rear bumper’s cutouts. Full carbon fiber hood (Seibon or C-West) with a custom vented scoop for the intercooler piping.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a Cusco bolt-in roll cage (8-point, with gussets for the Carib’s unique rear hatch structure) and Recaro Pole Position seats (or Bride Zeta III for weight savings). Custom gauge cluster with Defi Advance BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR) mounted in a custom carbon fiber dash panel (VIS Racing or custom).
